concerns.detail: Disclosure of PhD student's full real name (jiageng mao) in a derogatory context
concerns.excerpt: 组里逆天 phd jiageng mao 没水平

concerns.detail: Unsupported personal attack on a specific student's character and competence using insults ('逆天', '没水平')
concerns.excerpt: 组里逆天 phd jiageng mao 没水平 一个人带十几个intern啥都做不出来 只想着水论文

concerns.detail: Deletion of lengthy, detailed defense of advisor Haoran Geng including specific claims about recommendation letters, internship numbers, and financial support, while concurrent insertions add attacks against the same advisor; appears to suppress substantive counter-evidence rather than perform cleanup
concerns.excerpt: 作为知情人不知道谁在说这些, 过于离谱真的看不下去了:/ ... 我是耿哥去年带的intern。这期间我发了3篇 paper... 耿哥真的在努力帮我...
